user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view employees alongside their asset details including pending ARF, issued assets, returned assets and total asset value, so that I can track asset allocation per employee
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Asset List screen; When the list loads; Then each employee is shown with code, name, department, designation, date of joining, pending ARF, issued assets, returned assets and total asset value

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to toggle between Active Employees and Inactive Employees, so that I can review asset holdings for either group
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Asset List screen; When I select Active Employees or Inactive Employees and search; Then only employees of that status are listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter employee asset records by a period date range, so that I can view allocations within a chosen timeframe
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Asset List screen; When I set a From and To period and search; Then only records within that period are shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter employees by department, so that I can review asset assignments for a specific department
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Asset List screen; When I select a department and search; Then only employees in that department are displayed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to see the total asset value held with each employee in rupees, so that I can quantify the value of assets in employees' custody
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Asset List screen; When the list displays; Then the total asset value with employee is shown in rupees for each employee

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to reset the filters, so that I can return to the default employee asset list
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied employee status, period or department filters; When I click Reset; Then all filters clear and the default list is restored
